verses.text: Topa aw, bang hangin gamla din' na hi hiam? Haksat hunin bang hangin nang bucip khong na hi hiam
Migilote in kiphatsakna tawh mizawngte uuk delh uh hi. Amau ngaihsut vaihawmna mahah amaute awksak in
Bang hang hiam cih leh migilo in a lungsim deihna kisaktheihpih a, ngahna dingah a huaihampa in Topa phuisamin a taisan hi
Migilo in kiphatsakna lungsim nei a, Topa zonglo hi. Ama ngaihsutna khempeuhah, “Pasian om kei,” a ci hi
A hihna khempeuhah a ma pai ngitnget hi. Na thukhennate khempeuh ama muhna in a batzawh lohin sang mahmah a, a galte khempeuh ahih leh amah in nehpiksan lel hi
A lungsim sungah, “Kiling ngei kei ning; khang tawntungin kamsiatna tuak kei ning,” ci-in a ngaihsun hi
Ama kampaute pen hamsia, khemna, leh netniamna tawh kidim a, siatna leh manlohna bekbek thugenin a nei tawntung hi
Khuaneute sungah mi a buksimin tu a, munbu kawmah mawhnei lote a that hi. Ama mit in mi tuahsiate ensim a
humpinelkai in a kuahawm sung pan a buk bangin amah in buksimin, mizawngte a man dingin buk a, a ngenthang sungah mizawngte kai-in a man hi
A thatanghat thu tawh mi tuahsia mi sucipin a puksuk sak hi
Ama lungsim sungah, “Hih thute pen Pasian in mangngilh hi; a mai seel hi, enlo ding hi,” ci-in a ngaihsun hi
Tho in, Topa! Pasian aw, na tha hong san in la, a thuakte mangngilh kei in
Bang hangin migilo in Pasian simmawh a, a lungsim sungah, “Hong thei kei na'n teh,” ci ahi hiam
Nangmah in na mu hi. Na huh theihna dingin haksatna leh gimna a thuakte na ciamteh hi. A tuahsia mi in nangma tungah ama pumpi hong ap a, pa neilote a huhpa na hi hi
Giloin siatna a bawlte' khut kuaitan gawp in la, siatna a bawlzo nawnlo dingin gim pia in
Topa, a tawntungin kumpi hi a, ama leitang panin minam dangte beimang ding hi
Topa aw, lungnemte' deihna na ngai ding hi. A lungsim uh na hatsak ding a, na bil na ngat ding hi
Pa neilote leh netniamna a thuakte tungah nang na thutang a, leitung mite in launa tuakkha nawnlo ding uh hi.
